text_original: All my lovely characters were taken down.....trash app...trash operation...not recommended....I am so regret that opened a yearly pro....total scam
text_zh: 我所有心爱的角色都被删了……垃圾应用……垃圾运营……强烈不推荐……后悔开了年费会员……纯属诈骗
reply_original: Hi there, I'm truly sorry to hear about your characters being removed. Could you please email us at support@fantachat.ai with your UID and details about which characters were affected? We'll investigate immediately and do our best to resolve this for you. Your feedback is crucial to help us improve.
reply_zh: 你好，听说你的角色被删除我深感抱歉。能否请你将用户ID及受影响角色的详细信息发送至support@fantachat.ai？我们会立即调查并尽力为你解决。你的反馈对我们改进服务至关重要。
